title: Aura farming pe baltă
style_prefix: 3D Pixar-style animation, Romanian village aesthetic, warm golden cinematic lighting, soft global illumination, cohesive warm film color grade, highly detailed, vertical 9:16 composition
character_prefix: ohwxbunica, a cheerful elderly Romanian grandmother with rosy cheeks and kind eyes, wearing a white embroidered Romanian ie blouse and a red floral headscarf

shots.line: Fetelor! Pe internet toți își 'cultivă aura'. Aură? Eu cultiv ceapă, roșii și... aură. Veniți cu mine la baltă.
shots.image_prompt: standing by a small wooden rowboat at the edge of a calm village pond, gesturing toward the boat with an excited grin, reeds and golden light around her, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she gestures toward the little rowboat with an excited grin and beckons the camera, animated but coherent motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: Aura se cultivă la prova bărcii. Ca băiatul din Indonezia.
shots.image_prompt: a small wooden rowboat drifting gently on a calm misty village pond at golden hour, tall reeds and a single duck nearby, wide low shot from near the water
shots.motion_prompt: the small rowboat drifts gently across the calm pond, ripples spreading, a duck paddling alongside, slow serene coherent motion, steady camera
shots.sfx: gentle water lapping and a duck quacking on a calm pond

shots.image_prompt: standing balanced at the prow of the small wooden rowboat on the calm pond, doing a slow flowing rhythmic dance with both arms raised, headscarf fluttering in the breeze, confident serene expression, full body shot
shots.motion_prompt: she sways and flows her arms in a slow rhythmic dance at the boat prow, headscarf fluttering, smooth balanced coherent motion, steady framing

shots.voiceover: Rața îmi ține ritmul. Boom, boom, mac-mac.
shots.image_prompt: a plump white duck paddling steadily beside a wooden rowboat on a golden pond, water droplets on its back, close low shot near the water
shots.motion_prompt: the duck paddles steadily beside the boat, bobbing its head in rhythm, water rippling, lively coherent motion, steady low camera
shots.sfx: a duck quacking rhythmically with water splashing gently

shots.line: Nici nu transpir. Aura face totul.
shots.image_prompt: posing serenely at the prow of the rowboat with both arms spread wide and eyes half-closed, confident, golden pond and reeds behind her, full body shot
shots.motion_prompt: she spreads her arms wide at the prow and holds a serene confident pose, headscarf gently fluttering, minimal smooth coherent motion, stable framing

shots.voiceover: Echilibru. Asta-i cheia. Nu cad niciodată.
shots.image_prompt: the small wooden rowboat rocking very slightly on the calm golden pond, tall reeds swaying along the edge, wide serene shot
shots.motion_prompt: the rowboat rocks very gently on the calm water, reeds swaying slowly, serene coherent motion, steady camera

sfx.prompt: calm pond ambience with soft water movement and reeds rustling

shots.line: Vedeți? Maximum de aură, minimum de efort. Soft life pe baltă.
shots.image_prompt: standing relaxed in the wooden rowboat with both hands on her hips and a proud serene smile, golden pond and reeds behind her, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she rests her hands on her hips and gives a proud serene smile to the camera, subtle coherent motion, steady framing

shots.line: Dați like ca să vă crească aura. Și dați și la rață niște pâine. Pupici!
shots.image_prompt: waving goodbye from the wooden rowboat with a warm grin, the duck nearby on the golden pond, waist-up front-facing shot
shots.motion_prompt: she waves goodbye from the boat and blows a kiss to the camera, warm smile, gentle coherent natural motion
